Production Workflow
Select a BOM component below to begin component-wise stage execution. Project-level stage updates are not permitted — every production update is tracked against a specific BOM line item and its routing sequence.

Machine Performance & OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness)
OEE = Availability × Performance × Quality, computed from real downtime, output, and QC data

OEE by Machine
Availability × Performance × Quality

Quality Control & Rejection Tracking
All rejection data is captured once during QC Inspection and synced automatically — no manual entry
📋 Daily Rejection Records
Live feed — automatically generated from QC Inspection. No manual entry required.
Rejection by Category — Today
🔍 In-Process QC Queue
Material confirmed by Production at a stage — awaiting QC approval/rejection before it can advance to the next routing stage
0 pending
Only authorized QC personnel should perform inspection here. Approved quantity moves to the next routing stage automatically; rejected quantity moves to the Reject & Rework Log below.
ProjectComponentColor / Finish & CharacteristicsCompleted StageQty in QueueNext StageAction
⛔ Reject & Rework Log
QC-rejected quantity — rework is now automatic: a rejected quantity immediately spawns a new BOM line back at the first production stage
0 total
DateProjectComponentStageQty RejectedRejection CategoryDispositionQC PersonRoot CauseStatusRework
Pareto Analysis — 80/20 Defect Contribution
Live from QC Rejection Log · Updates automatically on every new rejection entry · Vital Few vs Trivial Many
📊 Pareto Chart — Rejection by Category
Rejection Count Cumulative % 80% threshold
🏆 Ranked Defect Contribution
📈 Monthly Rejection Trend — Top 5 Categories
Track how each defect category evolves month-to-month
🔍 Vital Few — Root Cause Summary
Defects contributing to 80% of total rejections require immediate RCA & corrective action
#Defect CategoryTotal QtyContribution %Cumulative %ClassificationMost Affected StageTop ProjectAction Required
PPM Score — Parts Per Million Defect Rate
PPM = (Total Rejections / Total Production) × 1,000,000  ·  Benchmark: 5,000 PPM (4-Sigma)
📉 Monthly PPM Score vs Benchmark
📋 Monthly PPM Detail
MonthRejectionProducedPPMvs BenchmarkStatus

Complete breakdown history
DateSegmentMachine / EquipmentCategoryPriorityTechnicianDowntimeStatusRCA
A 5-Why Root Cause Analysis is mandatory for every breakdown exceeding 2 hours of downtime. Open items below require completion. Use ⏸ Defer to temporarily skip without blocking operations.
🔍 Why-Why Analysis Required / Completed
Breakdown DateMachineDowntimeStatusResponsibleTarget DateRoot CauseActions
⚙️ Machine PM Configuration
Set each production machine's PM Frequency here. Initial PM Date should be entered only once, when a machine is first configured for Preventive Maintenance — it locks after saving.
MachinePM FrequencyCustom DaysInitial PM DateActions
Preventive Maintenance Schedule
Auto-generated from Machine Master · 3-day grace period · Overdue = past planned date + 3 days
📅 Machine-wise PM Schedule
EquipmentSegmentFrequencyPlanned DateDue In / OverdueTechnicianStatusActions

✅ PM Completion History
Planned vs Actual with delay analysis
EquipmentSegmentPlanned DateActual DateDelay (days)TechnicianRemarksOutcome
✅ Mark PM Completed
3-day grace period applies. Completion within 3 days of planned date = On-Time. Beyond 3 days = Delayed.
Maintenance KPI Dashboard — MTTR & MTBF
Combines Breakdown + Preventive Maintenance downtime into overall machine unavailability
🏭 Machine-wise MTTR / MTBF
MachineBreakdownsTotal DowntimeMTTRMTBFReliability
🔧 Technician-wise Performance
TechnicianRepairs CompletedAvg Repair TimeTotal Downtime Resolved
➕ Add New Tool to Inventory
The system continuously monitors stock — if Available Quantity falls below Minimum Stock Quantity, a Low Stock Alert is triggered automatically.
Tool CodeTool NameCategoryCompatible MachineSpecificationAvailable QtyMin StockSupplierCostStatus
📤 Issue Tool to Production
Issuing a tool automatically reduces its Available Quantity. If stock falls below the Minimum Stock Quantity, a Low Stock Alert is triggered immediately.

Document Management System — Controlled Document Library
ISO-compliant centralized repository · Version controlled · Audit traceable
Read-Only Access: You can view, search, and download documents. Only authorized Document Controllers (Admin) can upload, revise, or archive documents.
📁 Document Folders
All Documents
Click any row to view document details & revision history
Document Detail
📤 Upload New Document
All fields marked * are mandatory. Uploading a new revision will archive the previous version automatically — it will not be deleted.
📎
Click to select file — PDF, Excel, Word, PPT, Image, or any document format
Max 50MB · Previous revision is archived automatically
🔍 5-Why Root Cause Analysis
⚠
Workflow Override — Deferred Mode: You can save partial analysis now and mark this as "Deferred". The 5-Why will remain in the pending list so you can return later. This will not block any other maintenance entries.
Open
1Why did this breakdown occur?
2Why did that happen?
3Why did that happen?
4Why did that happen?
5Why did that happen? (Root Cause)
📅 Timeline Override / Production Hold Entry
⚠ Use only for external/approved delays outside production control. This override shifts the revised completion date forward and flags the delay reason. Production performance KPIs will exclude approved overrides from OTD penalty calculations.

Revised Timeline
